description:
These days, Spirytus is full of honest, hardworking torturers who love their jobs, but things weren`t always this easy. The world of torture is full of inherent dangers, many of which come from torturers who don`t follow the rules. That`s why Hera once dreamed of creating a place where torturers could feel safe. This is how it all began.
Source: Crunchyroll
